name: Simple Website Build
description: Build a basic website with API and UI

tasks.task: Design a REST API for a todo list application. Include endpoints for: list all todos, create todo, update todo, delete todo, and mark todo as complete. Return the OpenAPI spec.
Implement the API server based on the spec from the previous task. Use Node.js with Express. Include proper error handling and validation.
Create a simple HTML/CSS/JS frontend for the todo app. It should call the API endpoints and display todos in a list. Make it look clean and modern.
Write a README.md file explaining how to run the application. Include setup instructions, API documentation, and usage examples.
Create a Dockerfile for containerizing the application. Include multi-stage build for optimization. The app should expose port 3000.
